ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "mts" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data record */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Open price of the security at the specified timestamp */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Close price of the security at the specified timestamp */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* High price of the security during the specified timestamp */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Low price of the security during the specified timestamp */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the security during the specified timestamp */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality or reliability */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of the security (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the security */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer of the security */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the security */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_type" TEXT /* Type of the exchange (e.g., stock exchange, commodity exchange) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exchange was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_exchanges" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data-exchange relationship */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the market data record was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchanges_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_exchanges" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security-exchange relationship */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the security is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_exchanges_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_exchanges_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, trader) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission is granted */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view market data, create reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_platforms" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading platform (e.g., stock trading, options trading) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the trading platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trading platform was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management_systems" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk management system */,
  "system_type" TEXT /* Type of the risk management system (e.g., credit risk, market risk) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the risk management system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the risk management system was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data record */,
  "trading_platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading platform integrated with the market data record */,
  "risk_management_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk management system integrated with the market data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_risk_management_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_management_system_id") REFERENCES risk_management_systems ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_trading_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_platform_id") REFERENCES trading_platforms ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., viewed market data, generated report) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
